jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at NHPC
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
